chunks.title: Visions of Locusts and Fire
chunks.reason: Two visions of judgment followed by divine relenting in response to Amos's intercession.

chunks.title: Vision of the Plumb Line
chunks.reason: A third vision depicting God's judgment on Israel using a plumb line as a symbol.

chunks.title: Amaziah Confronts Amos
chunks.reason: Priest Amaziah sends a report to the king and commands Amos to leave Bethel.

chunks.title: Amos's Defense and Oracle
chunks.reason: Amos defends his calling against Amaziah and delivers a final judgment oracle.
